name: Grilled Chicken with Hazelnut Butter
recipeInstructions:
Recipe by: Lance Dean Velasquez, Moose's, San Francisco
To grill chicken:
1. Rub the chicken with melted butter.
2. Grill until cooked through.
3. To make hazelnut butter, combine ingredients in a bowl and blend until smooth.
4. Roll mixture into a cylinder and chill.
5. Top chicken with 2 slices of hazelnut butter.
6. Serve with roasted new potatoes, grilled portobello mushrooms, and sauteed escarole.
